_comment: OS-owned logs the pruning gate watches. Add a log here to enroll it; the gate never guesses ownership. trigger=warn-and-route line count, target=post-prune ceiling, ceiling=hard-block line count. Optional freshness.maxStaleDays enrolls a log in the inverse (staleness) check: 'atx_log_pruning_gate.py --freshness' warns, non-blocking, when the newest entry is older than that many days. Source rule: _memory/runtime/LOG-PRUNING-RULE.md
